description: Add homepage URL to the Slack plugin. Although Slack uses a wildcard subdomain pattern, app.slack.com is the canonical entry point that redirects to the user's workspace.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/slack && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add homepage to Slack plugin
userStories.description: Add homepage: 'https://app.slack.com' to both the Slack plugin class and package.json opentabs field.
acceptanceCriteria: SlackPlugin class has readonly homepage = 'https://app.slack.com' after urlPatterns
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/slack/src/index.ts (add homepage property to SlackPlugin class)
- plugins/slack/package.json (add homepage to opentabs field)

Context:
The SlackPlugin class currently has:
```typescript
class SlackPlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'slack';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for Slack';
  override readonly displayName = 'Slack';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://*.slack.com/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://*.slack.com/*'];`:
```typescript
  readonly homepage = 'https://app.slack.com';
```

2. In package.json opentabs field, add after urlPatterns:
```json
"homepage": "https://app.slack.com"
```

Constraints:
- Use `https://app.slack.com` NOT `https://slack.com` — the marketing site is not the app.
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add excludePatterns.
